subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the omnipotent Lord, befitting and meet, Who through His all-encompassing might and pervading power hath gathered a company of the oppressed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقتدری را لایق و سزا که جمعی از مظلومین را بقدرت کامله و قوت محیطه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @banishment to; life in 'Akka
